nav.whatsappDefault: Hi, I'd like to know more about {{name}}.

hero.whatsappDefault: Hi, I'd like more information about {{name}}.

heroInquiry.title: Pricing, floor plans and availability
heroInquiry.name: Name
heroInquiry.success: Received. An advisor will be in touch.
heroInquiry.required: Please fill in name and WhatsApp.
heroInquiry.disclaimer: We don't share your data. Only our sales team uses it.

location.heading: On Baja Sur's most preserved coast.

amenities.heading: Designed to live the project.
amenities.intro: Spaces built so residents and guests enjoy every day. Everything inside the development.

models.heading: Four ways to inhabit the project.
models.intro: From getaway studios to flagship sky villas. Every model designed with Sea of Cortez views and premium finishes.

availability.heading: Pick your unit.
availability.intro: Real-time inventory. Check final pricing, orientation and status for every unit.
availability.empty: No units match the selected filters.
availability.disclaimer: Prices may change without prior notice. Confirm final availability with an advisor.

payment.heading: Clear, flexible preventa terms.
payment.intro: Structured to spread the investment across the construction period, with the largest share due on delivery.

investment.heading: Model the yield on your unit.
investment.intro: Based on the East Cape corridor vacation-rental market. Adjust assumptions and see the impact live.

progress.heading: We build with transparency.
progress.intro: Estimated delivery: {{date}}. We document every milestone so you can see your investment progress.

developer.legalNote: Held in a Mexican trust (fideicomiso). Notarial closing in Baja California Sur. International financing available for foreign buyers.

leadCapture.heading: Receive the full information kit.
leadCapture.intro: An advisor from {{name}} contacts you with pricing, floor plans, and payment plans tailored to your profile.
leadCapture.whatsappDefault: Hi, I'd like to receive more information about {{name}}.
leadCapture.name: Full name
leadCapture.successBody: An advisor will contact you within 24 hours on WhatsApp with pricing, floor plans and availability.
leadCapture.required: Please fill in name, email and WhatsApp.
leadCapture.sendError: Couldn't send. Please try again or message us on WhatsApp.
leadCapture.disclaimer: We don't share your data with third parties. Only the project's sales team receives it.
